useCases.name: Maintains the Asset details
useCases.preConditions: System should support to capture the Asset details and insurance details
useCases.postConditions: Updated Asset details and insurance details saved in database.

workflow.action: Updates asset details including Supplier, Delivery order date, Asset cost, Origination state, Installation state, Registration number in system
Physically identifies the asset and ensures it is maintained in good condition and adequately insured
Maintains asset inspection details such as Asset ID, Agreement no, Inspection date, Remarks, Defect reason, Inspection done by, Next inspection date in system
Captures insurance details including Asset Description, Nature of Insurance, Policy no, Coverage/Insured amount, Insured date, Expiry date, Premium, Insurance Company in system
Saves the updated asset details and insurance details in the database

useCases.name: PDC Printing
preConditions: Submission of PDC cheques
Mode of repayment should be PDC
postConditions: The cheques will be printed with the installment amount, Payee name and the due date of the installment

workflow.action: Receives the PDC cheques from customer for using of finance repayment
Enters the PDC as the mode of payment and saves the repayment information in the System
Enters the PDCs list in the PDC collections section on the screen
Displays the PDC Print screen for the user to print the cheques
Selects the application ID/ Agreement ID and submits to search the application/finance details
Displays the screen for cheque printing
Checks the details of all the due instalments for cheque printing
Enters the blank cheques received from the customer in the printer to print the cheques
Submits the cheques to the printer
Prints the cheques with the Payee Name, Due Date and the installment amount for the number of installments selected for printing

useCases.name: Installment Prepayment
preConditions: The prepayment amount received from the customer is to be processed.
postConditions: Installment prepayment is done successfully.

workflow.action: Pays the prepayment installment as an advance.
Receives the amount from the customer to process the payment in the system.
Opens the Financial Management System application.
Navigates to Installment Prepayment screen.
Enters payment details including Prepayment ID, Customer Name, Agreement ID, Prepayment amount, Account No, Agreement Number, Installment amount, Principal amount, and Balance installment amount.
Allocates amount received towards the last installment and reduces the tenure by the number of installments prepaid by the customer.
Saves the record once the process is completed or resets the details.

useCases.name: NPA Grading
preConditions: Only selected accounts are to be marked / graded for NPA.
postConditions: NPA stage is done successfully

workflow.action: Opens the Financial Management System application
Navigates to Finance Grading screen
Defines the NPA stage for a finance account, like Standard, Sub-standard, Doubtful or Loss
Defines the NPA movements for finance accounts to derive the NPA stage
Understands NPA stage movement as either forward movement or backward movement
Operates the NPA stage in two ways: Automatic NPA marking and Manual NPA marking
Grades finance accounts manually by entering Agreement ID, New NPA stage, Remarks, NPA change date, Current NPA stage, Final NPA stage, and NPA reason
Saves the transaction after grading the NPA marking manually
Completes NPA grading successfully

useCases.name: NPA Provisioning
preConditions: Only selected accounts are to be provisioned for NPA
postConditions: NPA provisioning is done successfully

workflow.action: Opens the Financial Management System application
Navigates to Provisioning screen
Performs NPA provisioning using one of two available methods
For Auto Provisioning NPA process, inputs Provision ID, Effective from date, NPA Criteria, NPA stage, Constitution, Secured portion, Unsecured portion, and selects Authorized, Unauthorized or Both
For Manual provisioning process, inputs Date, User ID, Batch ID, Product, Previous provisioned amount, Previous additional provision amount, Customer Name, Secured portion and Unsecured portion
Saves the record after completion of NPA provisioning or cancels the action to reset details
Automatically posts the provisioned amount to General Ledger as per the NPA stage of the finance
Completes NPA provisioning process successfully

useCases.name: Settlements - Knock Off
preConditions: Receipts and payments details have to be considered into account
postConditions: Knock off is done successfully

workflow.action: Opens the Financial Management System application
Navigates to Knock Off in Settlements
Checks the pending amounts of both receivables and payables from Knock Off screen
Sets knock off amount payable against amount receivable from the customer
Validates that sum of receivable advices equals sum of payable advices for transaction knock off
Validates that allocated amount is not greater than amount to be allocated
Validates that knock off date is not greater than current business date
Shows only those advices of a finance whose advice date is less than or equal to knock off date entered
Ensures receivable and payable advices relate to one business partner type for knock off
Initiates knock off feature after validations and gets it authorized
Checks previous manual knock offs and selects record for reversal if required
Authorizes the knock-off reversal
Completes knock off successfully

useCases.name: Settlements – Cheque(Receipt/Payment) Processing
preConditions: User collects the details of cheques.
postConditions: Receipt/Payment processing is done successfully.

workflow.action: Opens the Financial Management System
Navigates to Receipt/Payment processing in Settlements
Enters the Payment/Receipt processing details in specified fields including Payment Mode, Agreement No., In favor of, Cheque No., Date, Amount, Currency, Cheque type, and Branch details
Saves the record once the details are captured
Completes Receipt/Payment processing successfully

useCases.name: Settlements Manual Advise
preConditions: User collects the payment details.
postConditions: Manual advice is done successfully.

workflow.action: Opens the Financial Management System application
Navigates to Manual advise in Settlements
Selects the business party for payment with agreement ID
Enters advice details including Advice ID, Advice Date, Agreement No., Advice amount, Advice type, Currency, Charge type, Maker ID, Date, and Remarks
Creates the due as per the defined process
Processes the payment to the customer
Confirms manual advice is done successfully

useCases.name: Termination / Foreclosure / Closure
preConditions: Only selected accounts are to be terminated or foreclosed.
postConditions: Termination or foreclosure is done successfully.

workflow.action: Opens the Financial Management System application.
Navigates to Finance Termination screen page.
Enters at least one ID selecting from App Id, Customer ID, Branch Id.
Checks the details of the application status including Agreement ID, Agreement date, Amount Fin, Frequency, Customer Name, Tenure, Agreement No.
Checks dues fields: Principal amount, Residual value, Past due installments, Outstanding payments, Total dues.
Checks refunds fields: Excess amount, Excess refunds, Advice, Rebate, Adv installments, Total Refunds.
Makes modifications or updates to the accounts as necessary.
Processes the payment so that the outstanding balance becomes zero and the account is closed.
Levies fees to customer to foreclose the account if early termination is done.
Completes termination or account foreclosure successfully.

useCases.name: Finance Viewer
preConditions: The same finance details disbursed through customer acquisition search shall be viewed from finance viewer screen.
postConditions: System shows the finance details in view mode.

workflow.action: Opens the Financial Management System application
Navigates to Finance Query Screen
Initiates the process for searching to view the finance details of the customer using one or more query parameters

Inputs parameters such as Date, Branch Name, Customer Name, Co-Applicant Details, Guarantor Details, Requested Amount, Sanctioned Amount, Disbursal Date, Disbursal Type, Period, Employer details, Employee details, Tenure, Installments details, Installment plan, Frequency, Number of Installments, Installment Mode, Advance Installment, Due Date, First Installment Date
Fetches and displays the complete finance details of selected finance ID and related details from Loan Origination System
Views the finance details in view mode

useCases.name: Floating Review Process
preConditions: Floating Rates and types shall be applied to all the financial instruments.
postConditions: Floating Rate Review is done successfully.

workflow.action: Opens the Financial Management System application
Navigates to Floating Review Process screen
Recalculates the floating profit depending on the change in Prime Lending Rate (PLR)
Applies the prime rate types to all finances from Floating Review Process page
Specifies Prime Rate Type for EMI & Pre-EMI schedules including EIBOR, LIBOR, Date
Updates the Floating Rate Review on daily basis and checks system for new EMI schedules if profit rate changes
Saves the transaction or cancels to reset the details
Completes the Floating Review Process successfully

useCases.name: Settlements - Receipts
preConditions: User generates the receipt advices through the system
postConditions: Receipt advices are initiated for the customers

workflow.action: Opens the Financial Management System application
Navigates to Receipts screen from Settlements
Enters details to generate Receipt Advices during the business transaction/process
Records all details of funds received by financial institution through cheque, cash, draft, transfer, or point of sale
Saves the payment details on receipt screen
Processes cheque payments through cheque processing module including receipt, deposit (maker & checker), and realization (maker & checker)
Processes cash payments in receipt screen in two stages: receipt and receipt deposit
Saves payment information and generates payment voucher
Prints voucher once record is saved on receipt of payment

useCases.name: WF_FMS_ Settlements - Payments
preConditions: User makes payments to the customer by various modes like cash, cheques and fund transfer.
postConditions: Payments are made to the customers.

workflow.action: Opens the Financial Management System application
Navigates to Settlement Payment screen for Settlements
Specifies the finance against which the payment needs to be created
Specifies the mode of payment along with details like cheque number, date of transaction, and payables against which the payment is to be made
Collects payment details of the customer including Cheque ID, Currency, Date, Customer Name, Amount, Cheque No, In Favor of, Payable at, Account No., Reason
Generates all the payable dues automatically or manually
Adjusts the payments manually at the time of payment
Generates various advices on the basis of Disbursal Payments, Insurance Premium payment and Excess money payment
Sends the process payment details for authorization before paying the amount to the customer

useCases.name: Settlements - Waive Off
preConditions: Receivable amounts are eligible for waive off
postConditions: Waive off is done successfully

workflow.action: Opens the Financial Management System application
Navigates to Waive Off in Settlements
Displays the receivable amounts that need to be waived off

Enters details: Agreement Number, Branch, Currency, Waive Off Date, Advice Details, Advice Date, Original amount, Current Advice amount, Already Waived Off amount, Already Adjusted amount, Amount to be waived off, Remarks
Saves the record and sends for authorization
Processes the waive off successfully

useCases.name: EOD/BOD in FMS
preConditions: Date should not be changed in the system automatically when date is changed in general

workflow.action: Run EOD processes scheduled by EOD setup
Execute End Of Day to check and nullify processes such as Profit Accruals, Late Payment Profit Calculation, Autos knock off, DPD Process, NPA Process, and Date Change Process
Calculate and keep Profit Accruals until application or maturity
Calculate overdue profit in Late Payment Profit Calculation process
Check outstanding payable and receivable advices and knock them off based on auto allocation logic
Calculate Days Past Due for client installments
Classify assets as Non-Performing based on defined criteria
Move system to next business date
Run BOD to start the day's activities
Execute BOD mainly for the process of converting PEMI to EMI and auto-generate EMI repayment schedule after disbursement authorization

useCases.name: Work Flow Closure – Account Closure
preConditions: Existing Finance Account
No due/Refund to the Finance Account
postConditions: Finance Account Closed
Customer is notified with the Finance Account status

workflow.action: Initiates the process for closure of Finance Account
Enters the agreement ID to retrieve the Finance Account for closure
Displays Finance Account details including Agreement ID, Customer Name, Amount Financed, Tenure, Profit Rate, Agreement No, EMI, Dues, and Refund details
Views the status of the Finance Account and ensures there is no Due or Refund to the customer
Closes the Finance Account if there is no Due or Refund
Notifies the Customer that the Finance Account is closed

useCases.name: Work Flow Closure – View Account Status
preConditions: Existing Finance Account
postConditions: Finance Account status viewed
Initiates the further process for closure of Finance Account

workflow.action: Selects the Account status option in the system
Enters the agreement ID to retrieve the Finance Account status

Displays Finance Account details including Agreement ID, Customer Name, Amount Financed, Tenure, Profit Rate, Agreement No, EMI, Dues (Balance Principal, Due Installments, Outstanding Payments, Prepayment Penalty, Profit on termination, Total Due), Refund (Excess Amount, Advance Installments, Excess Principal, Excess Profit, Total Refund)
Views the status of the Finance Account
If there is any due from the customer, requests repayment to proceed further for Closure process
If there is any Refund to the Customer, initiates the process for Refund to customer

useCases.name: Work Flow – Document Master
preConditions: Existing Finance Account
postConditions: Document status updated in Document Master

workflow.action: Initiates the process for updation of the document master with the document status pertaining to the Finance Account
Retrieves the Document Master pertaining to the Finance Account with the Agreement ID

Displays the Document Master with document stage, document for, customer name, finance type, guarantor/co-applicant, maker ID, checker ID, document details, description, document, mandatory, status, date, tracker no, reason, target date, validity date, remarks
Updates the Document Master with the Finance Account documents and saves the record

useCases.name: Finance Rescheduling - Bulk Prepayment
preConditions: Existing Finance Account
Bulk Repayment to the Finance Account
postConditions: Bulk Prepayment marked to the Finance Account
New Repayment schedule generated

workflow.action: Submits the request for Bulk Payment along with the Cash/Cheque to the Finance Account
Verifies the Finance Account details & initiates the process for making Bulk Prepayment
Initiates the process for generation of New Repayment schedule due to Bulk Prepayment
Retrieves the Finance Account details with the Agreement ID for generation of New Repayment Schedule

Displays the Finance Account details including Finance No, Agreement ID, Loan Type, Balance outstanding, Original Tenure, Due Date, Bulk Refund Amount, Reschedule Effective Date, Repayment Effective Date, Balance Tenure, Frequency, Profit Rate
Enters the Bulk Refund Amount & submits the record for generation of New Repayment Schedule
Retrieves the New Repayment Schedule with the Agreement ID, verifies and authorizes it if found correct
Generates the New Repayment schedule
Notifies the customer accordingly

useCases.name: Finance Rescheduling - Due Date Change
preConditions: Existing Finance Account
Due Date Change to the Finance Account
postConditions: Due date Change marked to the Finance Account
New Repayment schedule generated

workflow.action: Submits request for Due Date Change of the Finance Installment
Verifies the request and rules pertaining to the Due Date Change
Initiates process for Due Date Change after verification
Initiates generation of New Repayment Schedule due to Due Date Change
Retrieves Finance Account details with Agreement ID for New Repayment Schedule generation

Displays Finance Account details including Finance No, Agreement ID, Loan Amount, Original Tenure, Original Due Date, Outstanding Amount, Reschedule Effective Date, Repayment Effective Date, Bulk Refund Amount, Balance Tenure, Frequency, Rate of Interest
Modifies Due Date of the Installment and submits for New Repayment Schedule generation
Retrieves and verifies the New Repayment Schedule using Agreement ID
Authorizes the New Repayment Schedule if found correct
Generates New Repayment Schedule and notifies the Customer

useCases.name: Finance Rescheduling - Rate of Interest Change
preConditions: Existing Finance Account
Interest Rate Change to the Finance Account requested
postConditions: Interest Rate Change marked to the Finance Account
New Repayment schedule generated

workflow.action: Submits the request for Interest Rate Change of the Finance Account at the Bank
Verifies the Interest Rate Change request and related rules
Initiates the process for Interest Rate Change after verification
Initiates process for generation of New Repayment Schedule
Retrieves Finance Account details using Agreement ID for new schedule generation

Displays Finance Account details including Finance No, Agreement ID, Original Loan Amount, Original Rate of Interest, Original Tenure, Due Date, Reschedule Effective Date, Repayment Effective Date, Bulk Refund Amount, Balance Tenure, Frequency, Modified Interest Rate
Modifies Interest Rate of Finance Account and submits for new Repayment Schedule generation
Retrieves and verifies the New Repayment Schedule using Agreement ID
Authorizes the New Repayment Schedule if found correct
Generates the New Repayment Schedule and notifies the Customer

useCases.name: Finance Rescheduling - Tenure Change
preConditions: Existing Finance Account
Tenure Change requested for the Finance Account
postConditions: Tenure Change marked to the Finance Account
New Repayment schedule generated

workflow.action: Submits request for Tenure Change at the Bank
Verifies the Tenure Change request and applicable rules
Initiates the process for Tenure Change upon verification
Modifies the Tenure of the Finance Account
Initiates generation of New Repayment Schedule
Retrieves Finance Account details using Agreement ID

Displays Finance Account details including Finance No, Agreement ID, Loan Amount, Original Tenure, EMI Amount, Due Date, Reschedule Effective Date, Repayment Effective Date, Bulk Refund Amount, Balance Tenure, Frequency, Rate of Interest
Modifies Balance Tenure and submits for New Repayment Schedule generation
Retrieves New Repayment Schedule using Agreement ID and verifies it
Authorizes the New Repayment Schedule if found correct
Generates New Repayment Schedule and notifies the Customer

useCases.name: Post Disbursal Edit
useCases.postConditions: Non Financial information pertaining to the Finance Account modified.

workflow.action: Initiates the process for modification of Non Financial information of the Finance Account.
Enters the agreement ID to retrieve the Finance Account for modification of Non Financial information.
Displays the Account details.
Selects the specific tab and modifies details such as Guarantor Details, Co-Applicant Details, Address Details, Work Details, and Instrument Details.
Modifies the required details and saves the record for modification of the details.

useCases.name: Repayment Deferral - Constitution Based Deferral
preConditions: Existing Finance Account
Need for Repayment Deferral
postConditions: Repayment Deferral marked to the Finance Account through Constitution Based process

workflow.action: Initiates the Deferral marking process through constitution based approach
Selects the particular constitution to mark deferral in Deferral option
Displays the list of Finance Accounts pertaining to the constitution
Selects the Finance Account for which the deferral needs to be marked
Enters Deferral Effective Date and No of Deferrals details
Submits the record for deferral marking
Verifies the Deferral record details and authorizes if found correct
Notifies customers pertaining to the Finance Accounts on the Deferral

useCases.name: Finance Wise Deferral
preConditions: Existing Finance Account
Repayment Deferral request received from the customer
postConditions: Repayment Deferral marked to the Finance Account

workflow.action: Submits the request for Repayment Deferral by quoting the number of deferrals
Verifies the Deferral request submitted by the customer and checks Deferral rules for the Finance Account
Initiates the process to update deferral details in the system once deferral rules are satisfied
Retrieves Finance Account details with Agreement ID for deferral update
Displays deferral screen with relevant finance and deferral parameters
Captures deferral details and generates new repayment schedule
Submits the new repayment schedule for authorization
Verifies and authorizes the new repayment schedule
Notifies customer of the authorized new repayment schedule

useCases.name: Repayment Deferral Batch (Portfolio) Wise Deferral
preConditions: Existing Finance Account
Need for Repayment Deferral
postConditions: Repayment Deferral marked to the Batch (Portfolio)

workflow.action: Creates a file containing deferral details pertaining to the portfolio
Uploads the deferral file into the system for deferral marking
Selects the file and upload date and submits the file for upload
Processes the uploaded file
Verifies the deferral file and authorizes if correct
Notifies customers pertaining to the portfolio on the deferral
